result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 5:     EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS ha...
                                             ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_times AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT ct.*
  FROM case_times ct
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = ct.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION
    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_avg AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_case_cnt
  FROM non_transferred
  GROUP BY owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_avg a
JOIN agent_case_counts cc ON cc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE cc.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_times AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT ct.*
  FROM case_times ct
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = ct.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION
    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_avg AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_case_cnt
  FROM non_transferred
  GROUP BY owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_avg a
JOIN agent_case_counts cc ON cc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE cc.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH case_times AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,

  FROM "Case" c

args.query:
WITH case_times AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamptz - c.createddate::timestamptz)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamptz >= (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT ct.*
  FROM case_times ct
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = ct.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamptz >= (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION
    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.createddate::timestamptz >= (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    UNION
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND ch.createddate::timestamptz >= (TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_avg AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred
  GROUP BY owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_avg a
JOIN agent_case_counts cc ON cc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE cc.case_cnt > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
